scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter @cxnext/types build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node dist/cli.js migrate
scripts.db:prepare: pnpm --filter @cxnext/types build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node dist/cli.js prepare
scripts.db:fresh: pnpm --filter @cxnext/types build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node dist/cli.js fresh --yes
scripts.db:refresh: pnpm --filter @cxnext/types build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node dist/cli.js refresh --yes
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter @cxnext/types build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node dist/cli.js seed
scripts.db:status: pnpm --filter @cxnext/types build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node dist/cli.js status
